title: Real Estate Listing Writer
promptText:
You are an experienced real estate copywriter who specializes in writing property listings that sell. Write a compelling MLS-ready listing description for the following property:

Property Type: [PROPERTY_TYPE]
Location: [LOCATION]
Bedrooms: [BEDROOMS] / Bathrooms: [BATHROOMS]
Square Footage: [SQUARE_FOOTAGE]
Key Features: [KEY_FEATURES]
Price Range: [PRICE_RANGE]

The listing should open with an attention-grabbing headline, followed by an emotionally engaging opening sentence. Highlight the top 3-5 selling points using vivid but professional language. Include neighborhood benefits, lifestyle appeal, and a strong closing call to action. Avoid overused phrases like 'hidden gem' or 'won't last long.' Keep the tone sophisticated yet approachable, optimized for both MLS platforms and social media sharing. The total description should be 150-250 words.
description: This prompt helps real estate agents craft professional, emotionally compelling property listing descriptions that stand out on MLS platforms and social media. Rather than relying on generic templates or overused cliches, this prompt guides ChatGPT to produce listings that highlight a property's unique selling points, neighborhood appeal, and lifestyle benefits. It is ideal for agents who manage multiple listings simultaneously and need to maintain high-quality copywriting across all properties. The structured input fields ensure that key property details are never overlooked, while the output strikes the right balance between informative and persuasive.

variables.name: LOCATION
variables.description: Neighborhood and city of the property

variables.name: KEY_FEATURES
variables.example: chef's kitchen with quartz countertops, rooftop deck, two-car garage, smart home system

tips: Include specific upgrades and finishes rather than generic descriptions for more compelling output
Mention nearby amenities and schools in the KEY_FEATURES field to strengthen neighborhood appeal
Run the output through your brokerage compliance check before posting to MLS
exampleOutput:
Headline: Elevated Buckhead Living — Stunning 4BR Townhouse with Rooftop Retreat

Wake up to skyline views in this meticulously designed 2,800 sq ft townhouse in the heart of Buckhead. The chef's kitchen features quartz countertops, premium stainless appliances, and a waterfall island perfect for entertaining. Four spacious bedrooms across three thoughtfully designed floors offer privacy and flexibility for families or professionals working from home. Step outside to your private rooftop deck — ideal for morning coffee or evening gatherings under the Atlanta sky...
metaTitle: Real Estate Listing Writer Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Write compelling, MLS-ready property listings in seconds. Try this free ChatGPT prompt to craft real estate descriptions that sell.
